title: ficus reflexa subsp. reflexa
intro: Ficus reflexa subsp. reflexa, also known as the beach ficus or beach fig, is a subspecies of fig tree that is native to tropical coastal regions. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ficus reflexa subsp. reflexa include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
